name: 酸碱盐
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应与化学变化 / Reactions / Reactions
curriculum_points:
1 describe the structure of a chromosome, limited to:
• DNA
• histone proteins
n• sister chromatids
• centromere
• telomeres

3 outline the mitotic cell cycle, including:
• interphase (growth in G and G phases and DNA
1 2
replication in S phase)
• mitosis
• cytokinesis

4 outline the role of telomeres in preventing the loss of genes
from the ends of chromosomes during DNA replication

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「酸碱盐」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1 describe the structure of a chromosome, limited to:
• DNA
• histone proteins
n• sister chromatids
• centromere
• telom…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：3 outline the mitotic cell cycle, including:
• interphase (growth in G and G pha… 对理解「酸碱盐」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
